ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., ABS, PLA, PETG) */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the material (e.g., percentage of additives) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the material */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the material */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the material per unit */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "printing_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each printing setting */,
  "layer_height" REAL /* Layer height of the print */,
  "wall_thickness" INTEGER /* Wall thickness of the print */,
  "infill_density" INTEGER /* Infill density of the print */,
  "infill_pattern" TEXT /* Infill pattern of the print */,
  "nozzle_temperature" INTEGER /* Nozzle temperature during printing */,
  "bed_temperature" INTEGER /* Bed temperature during printing */,
  "print_speed" INTEGER /* Print speed during printing */,
  "adhesion_sheet" INTEGER /* Use of adhesion sheet */,
  "raft" INTEGER /* Use of raft */,
  "support_material" INTEGER /* Use of support material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanical property */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the printing setting used */,
  "tension_strength" REAL /* Tension strength of the printed object */,
  "elongation" REAL /* Elongation of the printed object */,
  "youngs_modulus" REAL /* Young's modulus of the printed object */,
  "yield_strength" REAL /* Yield strength of the printed object */,
  "impact_resistance" REAL /* Impact resistance of the printed object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mechanical_properties_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES printing_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mechanical_properties_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the printing setting used */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanical property measured */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the data was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES printing_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES mechanical_properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data upload */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the data was versioned */,
  "version_time" TEXT /* Time the data was versioned */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES data_uploads ("upload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material characteristic */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., melting point, density) */,
  "characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the characteristic value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_characteristics_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "printing_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each printing statistic */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the printing setting */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., print time, print volume) */,
  "statistic_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the statistic value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_printing_statistics_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES printing_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roughness_values" (
  "roughness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roughness value */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the printing setting */,
  "roughness_value" REAL /* Roughness value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the roughness value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roughness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roughness_values_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES printing_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material review */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_reviews_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "setting_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting review */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the printing setting reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_setting_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_setting_reviews_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES printing_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time the log entry was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
